name: considering-deflection
prompt: Medium shot. Young brunette woman seated against viewport, looking down and to the side. Considering deflection — the careful nothing she'd give anyone else. Transport interior visible behind her, cool blue-white lighting. Guarded posture, arms slightly crossed. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: raw-answer
prompt: Close-up. Young brunette woman, eyes not meeting the other's gaze, looking to the side. Speaking flat, clinical — like reading someone else's file. Expression controlled but raw underneath. Cool blue light from left, face partially shadowed. Background abstract cool tones. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: The other half of the highest bilateral synergy ever recorded. A man who chose to remember.

name: two-shot-aftermath
prompt: Two-shot from side of aisle. Brunette woman (Sera) LEFT, still not meeting eyes, having just spoken. Older silver-haired woman (Reva) RIGHT, posture shifting — recognition, calculation, both. Space between them charged. Cool blue-white transport lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
